# Molecular Modeling

**Summary**: Computational methods to simulate molecular behavior and gas transport in complex structures.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-afagwu|AFAGWU, 2023]] applied MD simulations and GCMC to model methane adsorption and diffusion in various kerogen types.
